build.buildCommand: cp prisma/schema.postgresql.prisma prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate && npm run build && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && (cp -r public .next/standalone/public 2>/dev/null || true)

deploy.startCommand: npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && HOSTNAME=0.0.0.0 node .next/standalone/server.js
